    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    E

    EMPRESS - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.TarotType
    Utility card with self-heal and lower outgoing damage.
    endGameAndShowPopup(int) - Method in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Convenience overload that builds a winner message from player number.
    endGameAndShowPopup(String) - Method in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Stops gameplay loop and displays a centered popup with custom message.
    enemy - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Opponent player instance used for collision and damage calculations.
    Exorcist - Class in logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters
    Exorcist hybrid character using projectile bullets with ammo and reload mechanics.
    Exorcist() - Constructor for class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Creates Exorcist with default hybrid stats.
    Exorcist(int, int, int, int, float) - Constructor for class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Creates Exorcist with custom stats.
